mutations.description: Mutates the right-hand equality target to inject a successor mismatch (n + m = m + S n).
mutations.mutated_theorem_statement: Theorem exercise_42_mut : forall n m : nat, n + m = m + S n.

mutations.description: Guards against a vacuous/inconsistent formalization: a False-hypothesis-guarded goal must not be discharged dishonestly (ignoring the hypothesis).
mutations.mutated_theorem_statement: Theorem exercise_42_vacuous : False -> forall n m : nat, n + m = m + n.
